message:
Update sitemap.xml with latest build timestamps

Automated refresh of lastmod timestamps to 2026-01-11T02:32:03.640Z
across all 11 sitemap URLs. This reflects the most recent build cycle
and keeps SEO freshness signals current.

Note: The sitemap is regenerated during builds. These timestamp-only
updates ensure the committed version stays reasonably synchronized
with the live site state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
